title: Invariant Testing, Fuzzing, and Reproducible Benchmarks · Execution Trace: Optimization Proof
summary: Audit custom structures whose happy paths pass but long random operation sequences corrupt state. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa optimization proof increment in a model-based test and benchmark harness. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Require correctness equivalence and measured stakeholder benefit before keeping an optimization.
Control setup, warmup, repetition, input distribution, and measured operation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
